title: Verify Trial Corner is only shown to the specified user cohort
description: Tests that the Trial Corner feature is correctly assigned only to users who haven't started consumption within the first 5 minutes post-activation.
preconditions: User A activated a trial and did not watch content for >5 mins.
User B activated a trial and started watching content within 2 mins.

steps.description: 1. Log in as User A and observe the homepage for the Trial Corner widget.
3. Log in as User B and observe the homepage.

expected_result: User A sees the new Trial Corner widget/pill and is directed to the Trial Corner hub. User B sees the old trial management flow and does not see any Trial Corner UI components.
